title: Spacing & Sizing
content:
### Spacing Scale

Tailwind uses a consistent 4px-based spacing scale. Each unit = 0.25rem (4px by default):

| Class | Value | px |
|-------|-------|----|
| `p-0` | 0 | 0px |
| `p-1` | 0.25rem | 4px |
| `p-2` | 0.5rem | 8px |
| `p-3` | 0.75rem | 12px |
| `p-4` | 1rem | 16px |
| `p-6` | 1.5rem | 24px |
| `p-8` | 2rem | 32px |
| `p-12` | 3rem | 48px |
| `p-16` | 4rem | 64px |
| `p-20` | 5rem | 80px |
| `p-24` | 6rem | 96px |

### Padding Utilities

```html
<div class="p-4">    /* padding: 1rem all sides */
<div class="px-4">   /* padding-left/right: 1rem */
<div class="py-2">   /* padding-top/bottom: 0.5rem */
<div class="pt-4">   /* padding-top: 1rem */
<div class="pr-4">   /* padding-right: 1rem */
<div class="pb-4">   /* padding-bottom: 1rem */
<div class="pl-4">   /* padding-left: 1rem */
```

### Margin Utilities

```html
<div class="m-4">    /* margin: 1rem all sides */
<div class="mx-auto">/* margin-left/right: auto (center) */
<div class="my-8">   /* margin-top/bottom: 2rem */
<div class="mt-6">   /* margin-top: 1.5rem */
<div class="mb-2">   /* margin-bottom: 0.5rem */
<div class="ml-auto">/* margin-left: auto */
```

### Width Utilities

```html
<div class="w-0">    /* width: 0px */
<div class="w-4">    /* width: 1rem */
<div class="w-64">   /* width: 16rem */
<div class="w-1/2">  /* width: 50% */
<div class="w-2/3">  /* width: 66.666667% */
<div class="w-3/4">  /* width: 75% */
<div class="w-full"> /* width: 100% */
<div class="w-screen">/* width: 100vw */
<div class="w-auto"> /* width: auto */
<div class="w-[200px]"> /* arbitrary value */
```

### Height Utilities

```html
<div class="h-4">     /* height: 1rem */
<div class="h-64">    /* height: 16rem */
<div class="h-full">  /* height: 100% */
<div class="h-screen">/* height: 100vh */
<div class="h-auto">  /* height: auto */
```

### Min/Max Width & Height

```html
<div class="min-w-0">     /* min-width: 0px */
<div class="min-w-full">  /* min-width: 100% */
<div class="min-h-screen">/* min-height: 100vh */
<div class="max-w-xs">    /* max-width: 20rem */
<div class="max-w-lg">    /* max-width: 32rem */
<div class="max-w-7xl">   /* max-width: 80rem */
<div class="max-h-96">    /* max-height: 24rem */
```

### Arbitrary Values

Tailwind v3+ supports any value with square bracket syntax:

```html
<div class="w-[calc(100%-2rem)]">
<div class="h-[32px]">
<div class="p-[13px]">
<div class="m-[2.5rem]">
```
